description: Scenarios with minor stylistic or preference tensions

scenarios.name: mild_politeness_conflict
scenarios.rationale: Mild contradictions that create tension but don't fundamentally oppose each other. Tests handling of nuanced conflicts.

scenarios.name: mild_detail_conflict
scenarios.rationale: Tests ability to find middle ground between conflicting style preferences.

scenarios.name: mild_tone_conflict
scenarios.rationale: Tests resolution of conflicting tone directives.
